_README: Tier-2 UAE Web3 ecosystem directory. ADD ONLY verified entries. Each entry: a NAMED source + lastVerified, confirmed to (1) resolve to a real live company, (2) have a UAE nexus, (3) NOT be a VARA-licensed VASP (cross-check data/vara-register.json). Never fabricate. Empty is honest. See ecosystem-directory-brief.md.
verificationStandard: Every listing must trace to a named source and pass per-entry checks: real & resolvable, live presence, UAE nexus, NOT a VARA VASP, sourced. Unverifiable candidates are excluded, not listed.

hubs.name: DMCC Crypto Centre
hubs.note: One of the largest concentrations of crypto and blockchain businesses in the MENA region, within the DMCC free zone, Dubai.

hubs.name: DIFC Innovation Hub
hubs.note: Dubai International Financial Centre's technology and fintech community (DIFC is regulated by the DFSA, separate from VARA).

hubs.name: RAK DAO
hubs.note: Ras Al Khaimah Digital Assets Oasis — a free zone for digital-asset and Web3 companies.

hubs.name: Hub71
hubs.note: Abu Dhabi's global tech ecosystem, including a digital-assets track.

hubs.name: Dubai Internet City
hubs.note: Long-standing Dubai technology free zone hosting Web3 and infrastructure firms.

entities.name: Crypto Oasis
entities.description: Dubai-based blockchain ecosystem builder and venture-building company supporting Web3 organisations across the Middle East.
